Package exchange

Class Exchange

java.lang.Object
exchange.Exchange
public class Exchange extends Object
It implements the exchange

1.0
Author:
Duna P.R.

  • Constructor Details

    • Exchange

      public Exchange(LocalDateTime date, boolean exchanged, RegisteredClient user1, ArrayList<SecondHandProduct> products1, RegisteredClient user2, ArrayList<SecondHandProduct> products2)
      Creates a new exchange
      Parameters:
      date - , the date it was exchanged
      exchanged - , whether the exchange was done
      user1 - , the registered client that owns the products "products1"
      products1 - , the products of user1
      user2 - , the registered client that owns the products "products2"
      products2 - , the products of user2

    • Exchange

      public Exchange(LocalDateTime date, RegisteredClient user1, ArrayList<SecondHandProduct> products1, RegisteredClient user2, ArrayList<SecondHandProduct> products2)
      Creates an exchange with the date
      Parameters:
      date - , the date it will be exchanged
      user1 - , the registered client that owns the products "products1"
      products1 - , the products of user1
      user2 - , the registered client that owns the products "products2"
      products2 - , the products of user2

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Obtains the id of a product
      Returns:
      the id, the id of the product

    • getDate

      public LocalDateTime getDate()
      The time when the exchange took place
      Returns:
      the date, the time of the exchange

    • setDate

      public void setDate(LocalDateTime date)
      Sets the date of the exchange
      Parameters:
      date - the date to set

    • isExchanged

      public boolean isExchanged()
      Obtains if the exchange was done
      Returns:
      true if the exchange was done, false if not

    • setExchanged

      public void setExchanged(boolean exchanged)
      Sets the state of the exchange
      Parameters:
      exchanged - the exchanged to set

    • getTotalId

      public static int getTotalId()
      Obtains the total id of the exchanges
      Returns:
      the totalId

    • getProductos_propietario

      public HashMap<RegisteredClient,ArrayList<SecondHandProduct>> getProductos_propietario()
      Obtains the clients and products involved in the exchange
      Returns:
      the productos_propietario, the HashMap of the clients and their products

    • changeExchanged

      public void changeExchanged(boolean exchanged)
      Changes if the exchange was done
      Parameters:
      exchanged - , the state of exchange

    • changeDate

      public void changeDate(LocalDateTime date)
      Changes the date of the exchange
      Parameters:
      date - , the date of the exchange
